Package org.eventb.core.tests

Class VariantTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.EventBTest
org.eventb.core.tests.VariantTest
public class VariantTest extends EventBTest
Unit tests for Event-B variants. Verifies that the labels introduced in version 3.4 work as expected.
Since:
3.4

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    assertLabelAttribute(String expected)
     
    void
    setUp()
    Creates a machine with a single unlabeled variant.
    void
    testGetLabelAbsent()
    Ensures that getLabel() returns the default label when the attribute is absent in the Rodin database.
    void
    testGetLabelPresent()
    Ensures that getLabel() returns the label value when the attribute is present in the Rodin database.
    void
    testHasLabelAbsent()
    Ensures that hasLabel() returns true even when the attribute is absent in the Rodin database.
    void
    testHasLabelPresent()
    Ensures that hasLabel() returns true when the attribute is present in the Rodin database.
    void
    testSetLabelAbsentDefault()
    Ensures that setLabel() does not change anything when the attribute was absent in the Rodin database and the value is the default one.
    void
    testSetLabelAbsentNonDefault()
    Ensures that setLabel() creates an attribute when the attribute was absent and the value is not the default one.
    void
    testSetLabelPresentDefault()
    Ensures that setLabel() removes the attribute that was present in the Rodin database when the value is the default one.
    void
    testSetLabelPresentNonDefault()
    Ensures that setLabel() updates the attribute that was present in the Rodin database when the value is not the default one.

      Creates a machine with a single unlabeled variant.

    • testHasLabelAbsent

      public void testHasLabelAbsent() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that hasLabel() returns true even when the attribute is absent in the Rodin database.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testHasLabelPresent

      public void testHasLabelPresent() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that hasLabel() returns true when the attribute is present in the Rodin database.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testGetLabelAbsent

      public void testGetLabelAbsent() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that getLabel() returns the default label when the attribute is absent in the Rodin database.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testGetLabelPresent

      public void testGetLabelPresent() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that getLabel() returns the label value when the attribute is present in the Rodin database.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testSetLabelAbsentDefault

      public void testSetLabelAbsentDefault() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that setLabel() does not change anything when the attribute was absent in the Rodin database and the value is the default one.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testSetLabelAbsentNonDefault

      public void testSetLabelAbsentNonDefault() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that setLabel() creates an attribute when the attribute was absent and the value is not the default one.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testSetLabelPresentDefault

      public void testSetLabelPresentDefault() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that setLabel() removes the attribute that was present in the Rodin database when the value is the default one.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • testSetLabelPresentNonDefault

      public void testSetLabelPresentNonDefault() throws RodinDBException
      Ensures that setLabel() updates the attribute that was present in the Rodin database when the value is not the default one.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
